original_question: For Melanoma trials, what is the minimum follow-up time by treatment arm?
gt_sql: SELECT "Author", "Type of follow-up given" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Melanoma' AND "Type of follow-up given" = 'Minimum';

original_question: Which trials of Atezolizumab for Colorectal cancer used a multikinase inhibitor as the control?
gt_sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Name of ICI", "Control arm", "Cancer type", "Trial name" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Name of ICI" = 'Atezolizumab' AND "Cancer type" = 'Colorectal' AND "Control arm" = 'Multikinase inhibitor';

original_question: Which trials used an antibody-drug conjugate as a control arm?
gt_sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Control arm", "Cancer type", "Control regimen", "Trial phase" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Control arm" = 'Antibody-drug conjugate';

original_question: Find Phase 3 trials of Durvalumab or Tremelimumab for gastric or gastroesophageal junction cancer that are follow-up publications?
gt_sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Name of ICI", "Trial phase", "Cancer type" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Trial phase" = 'Phase 3' AND "Originial publication or Follow-up" = 'Follow-up';

original_question: Show the author and class of immune checkpoint inhibitor for Multiple Myeloma studies not included in the meta-analysis that used PD1 or CTLA-4 agents?
gt_sql: SELECT "Author", "Class of ICI" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Multiple Myeloma' AND "Class of ICI" = 'PD1' AND "Included in MA" = 'No';

original_question: Find Phase 3 Ipilimumab trials in Melanoma that were follow-up publications?
gt_sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Name of ICI", "Trial phase", "Cancer type" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Name of ICI" = 'Ipilimumab' AND "Cancer type" = 'Melanoma';

original_question: Find phase 2 clinical trials for Urothelial cancer that compared immunotherapy to anti-VEGF therapy?
gt_sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Trial phase", "Control arm", "Cancer type", "Treatment regimen" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Urothelial' AND "Trial phase" = 'Phase 2' AND "Control arm" = 'Placebo';

original_question: Which phase 3 trials for Non-Small Cell Lung cancer compared immunotherapy to an mTOR inhibitor, excluding trials with chemotherapy as the control arm?
gt_sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Trial phase", "Control arm", "Cancer type", "Name of ICI", "Treatment regimen" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Non-Small Cell Lung' AND "Trial phase" = 'Phase 3';

original_question: What are the regimens for Phase 2 clinical trials combining PD1 and CTLA-4 for Head and Neck cancer?
gt_sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Trial phase", "Class of ICI", "Monotherapy/combination", "Cancer type", "Name of ICI", "Treatment regimen" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Class of ICI" = 'PD1, CTLA-4' AND "Cancer type" = 'Melanoma' AND "Trial phase" = 'Phase 2';

original_question: Find trials for hepatocellular cancer that report median follow-up duration in months for both treatment and control arms?
gt_sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Type of follow-up given", "Cancer type", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Rx", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Control" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Hepatocellular' AND "Type of follow-up given" = 'Median';

original_question: What phase 3 clinical trials for Mesothelioma compared immunotherapy to chemoradiation, excluding trials where chemoradiation was the control arm?
gt_sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Trial phase", "Control arm", "Cancer type", "Name of ICI", "Treatment regimen" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Mesothelioma' AND "Trial phase" = 'Phase 3';

original_question: Find the authors and trial phase for Non-Small Cell Lung cancer trials using Ipilimumab that are Phase 2 and were originally published?
gt_sql: SELECT "Author", "Trial phase" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Name of ICI" = 'Ipilimumab' AND "Cancer type" = 'Non-Small Cell Lung' AND "Trial phase" = 'Phase 2' AND "Originial publication or Follow-up" = 'Original publication';

original_question: What are the regimens for Phase 3 combination trials using CTLA-4 in Melanoma?
gt_sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Trial phase", "Class of ICI", "Monotherapy/combination", "Cancer type", "Treatment regimen" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Class of ICI" = 'CTLA-4' AND "Cancer type" = 'Melanoma' AND "Trial phase" = 'Phase 3' AND "Monotherapy/combination" = 'Combination';

original_question: Which phase 3 prostate cancer trials compared immunotherapy to chemotherapy plus anti-EGFR therapy?
gt_sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Trial phase", "Control arm", "Cancer type", "Name of ICI", "Treatment regimen" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Prostate';

original_question: List Avelumab trials for esophageal or gastroesophageal junction cancer with overall follow-up longer than 10.6 months?
gt_sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Name of ICI", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Overall", "Cancer type", "Trial phase" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Overall" > 10.6;

original_question: Find phase 3 urothelial cancer trials comparing immunotherapy to tyrosine kinase inhibitors?
gt_sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Trial phase", "Control arm", "Cancer type", "Name of ICI", "Treatment regimen" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Urothelial' AND "Control arm" = 'Chemo';

original_question: Show studies of Small Cell Lung cancer that used PD1 agents and were included in a meta-analysis?
gt_sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Included in MA", "Class of ICI", "Cancer type", "Name of ICI" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Small Cell Lung';

original_question: What are the regimens for Phase 3 combination trials studying Multiple Myeloma that use PD1 inhibitors?
gt_sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Trial phase", "Class of ICI", "Monotherapy/combination", "Cancer type", "Name of ICI", "Treatment regimen" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Multiple Myeloma' AND "Trial phase" = 'Phase 3' AND "Monotherapy/combination" = 'Combination';

original_question: Which phase 3 trials for esophageal or gastroesophageal junction cancer compared immunotherapy to a vaccine, excluding trials with chemotherapy as the control arm?
gt_sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Trial phase", "Control arm", "Cancer type", "Name of ICI", "Treatment regimen" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Esophageal/GEJ' AND "Trial phase" = 'Phase 3';

original_question: Find Phase 3 Ipilimumab trials in Melanoma that were follow-up publications?
gt_sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Name of ICI", "Trial phase", "Cancer type" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Melanoma';

original_question: Which studies of colorectal cancer tested combinations of immunotherapy, chemotherapy, and anti-VEGF therapies, and what were their primary endpoints?
gt_sql: SELECT "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Type of combination", "Cancer type", "Treatment regimen", "Primary endpoint" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Colorectal' AND "Type of combination" = 'ICI+MEKi';

original_question: Find trials for Non-Small Cell Lung cancer that use Tremelimumab in combination with other treatments?
gt_sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Name of ICI", "Monotherapy/combination", "Cancer type", "Type of combination", "Trial phase" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Non-Small Cell Lung';

original_question: Find phase 2 clinical trials for Urothelial cancer that compared immunotherapy to chemotherapy or anti-EGFR therapy?
gt_sql: SELECT "NCT", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Trial phase", "Control arm", "Cancer type", "Name of ICI", "Treatment regimen" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Urothelial' AND "Trial phase" = 'Phase 2' AND "Control arm" = 'Placebo';
